hero.announcement: BJHUNT 27B — The offensive security revolution starts here →
hero.title: Offensive Security Audits, Powered by Artificial Intelligence
hero.subtitle: BJHUNT 27B — our proprietary artificial intelligence model for offensive security
hero.description: Un prompt en langage naturel suffit. Zéro configuration. Zéro formulaire. BJHUNT 27B comprend, orchestre et délivre des rapports de conformité signés sur 13 frameworks.
hero.terminalLine6: [✓] Complete. 3 critical, 8 high, 12 medium. FP rate: 3.2%

toolsRail.title: 40+ tools you already know
toolsRail.description: Nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nuclei — every offensive tool you need, pre-installed and orchestrated. No VM sprawl. No license fatigue.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence over
features.description: Six capabilities that redefine what offensive security can deliver.

orchestration.title: Artificial Intelligence, Not Tooling
orchestration.description: One natural language prompt replaces hours of configuration. Describe what you need audited, BJHUNT 27B understands and orchestrates — no YAML, no CLI flags, no forms. Mid-audit adjustments through conversation.

nlp.title: Attack Paths, Not Findings
nlp.description: Don't list vulnerabilities. Chain them. One weakness leads to the next, building complete attack narratives from reconnaissance to full compromise. Realistic threat scenarios, not isolated scores.

reporting.title: 13 Frameworks, One Audit
reporting.description: OWASP, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST, RGPD, NIS2, DORA, HIPAA, CIS, MITRE ATT&CK — generated simultaneously, each compliance report signed and verifiable. One audit cycle, every standard covered.

scoring.title: Precision Scoring
scoring.description: CVSS v4 for severity. EPSS for exploitation probability. KEV for active wild exploitation. DREAD for business impact. Four dimensions, one verdict. No inflated scores.

security.title: Zero Trust Execution
security.description: Fail-closed scope enforcement. Signed mandates define what can be tested — nothing else executes. Isolated execution environments. No credential leakage. No scope creep.

compliance.title: Evidence That Stands Up
compliance.description: Every finding backed by cryptographic proof. SHA-256 hashes, timestamped evidence, automatic credential redaction, PKCS#7 signed reports. Audit trails that survive external review.

cta.description: No infrastructure. No installation. No configuration. Start your first audit in seconds.

cards.label: of organizations face targeted cyber attacks every year. The question isn't if you'll be targeted — it's when.

useCases.title: Offensive audits
useCases.description: One prompt in natural language. BJHUNT 27B understands, orchestrates, delivers. Zero configuration. Zero infrastructure. Zero forms.

cards.title: Web & API
cards.description: Injection, auth bypass, IDOR, GraphQL, SSRF — every vector tested, exploited, and documented with reproducible proof.

cards.title: Cloud & Infrastructure
cards.description: AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes — IAM abuse, storage exposure, pod escape, cross-account confusion. The attack is realistic, not theoretical.

cards.title: Compliance & Reporting
cards.description: 13 frameworks generated simultaneously. Every report PKCS#7 signed with RFC 3161 timestamping. Verifiable by any auditor.

tabs.label: 1. Describe
tabs.title: One prompt is enough.
tabs.description: Describe your audit in natural language. 'Audit example.com for OWASP Top 10 and PCI-DSS.' BJHUNT 27B extracts scope, selects frameworks, deploys specialists. No YAML. No CLI. No forms.

tabs.label: 2. Orchestrates
tabs.title: Artificial Intelligence in action.
tabs.description: BJHUNT 27B coordinates domain specialists — reconnaissance, exploitation, validation, reporting. Every finding automatically chained to real impact. Vulnerabilities aren't listed — they're narrated.

tabs.label: 3. Delivers
tabs.title: Reports that hold up.
tabs.description: Up to 14 reports per audit: one per compliance framework plus executive synthesis. Every PDF PKCS#7 signed, RFC 3161 timestamped. SHA-256 hashed evidence, redacted credentials. Acceptable by a QSA or a court.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence, not tooling
features.description: One natural language prompt replaces hours of configuration. The orchestrator understands your need and acts. Modify scope, add targets, switch compliance — all through conversation, in real time.

features.title: Attack paths, not findings
features.description: Don't list vulnerabilities. Chain them. XSS → CSRF → IDOR → privilege escalation. The full path to compromise is traced, documented, and scored on final impact.

features.title: 13 frameworks, one audit
features.description: OWASP, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST, GDPR, NIS2, DORA, HIPAA, CIS, MITRE ATT&CK — generated simultaneously, each report signed and verifiable. One audit cycle, every standard covered.

features.title: Precision scoring
features.description: CVSS v4 for technical severity. EPSS for exploitation probability. KEV for active wild exploitation. DREAD for business impact. Four dimensions, one verdict. Zero inflated scores.

features.title: Zero trust execution
features.description: The scope guard enforces signed mandates — out-of-scope targets are blocked before execution. Secrets never in plaintext. SHA-256 hashed evidence, auto-redacted, encrypted. Total isolation.

features.title: Irrefutable evidence
features.description: Every artifact — stdout, screenshots, PCAPs, memory dumps — captured with SHA-256 hash, credential redaction, timestamped provenance. Immutable audit trail. Acceptable by a QSA, internal auditor, or court.

inYourCode.title: In your
inYourCode.description: BJHUNT integrates where you already work. REST API, web dashboard, real-time streaming — no agent to install, no VPN to configure.

items.title: REST API
items.description: Launch audits, retrieve reports, manage engagements — all via API. CI/CD integration, webhooks, and SDK available.

items.title: Real-time dashboard
items.description: Track every finding, every proof, every decision in real time. 12 typed events streamed. No final report in 3 weeks — visibility now.

items.title: 40+ pre-deployed tools
items.description: Nmap, Burp Suite, Metasploit, Nuclei, BloodHound, Frida — every tool pre-installed, orchestrated, integrated. No VM. No license. No conflict.

cta.title: One prompt replaces
cta.description: No infrastructure. No installation. No configuration. Launch your first audit in seconds.

pricing.heroDescription: BJHUNT is not a freemium tool. It's a premium offensive security platform powered by BJHUNT 27B — purpose-built artificial intelligence that replaces weeks of manual audit work in minutes.

professional.name: Professional

features: Precision scoring (CVSS v4 + EPSS + KEV + DREAD)

pricing.supportText: Our team responds within 24 business hours.

technology.heroDescription: BJHUNT 27B is an offensive security artificial intelligence model trained on millions of incident reports, bug bounty submissions, zero-day disclosures, attack pattern taxonomies, and hundreds of compliance frameworks. Where general-purpose models aim for broad reasoning, BJHUNT is purpose-built for one thing: delivering complete, court-grade offensive security audits from a single natural-language prompt. 14 compliance frameworks. 3.2% false positive rate. Real-time duplex streaming. Isolated execution environments. Multi-tenant isolation enforced at every layer.

about.heroDescription: We built BJHUNT because the security industry deserved better. Fragmented tools, manual reporting, weeks of lead time — we built the platform we wished existed.

mission.title: Make world-class offensive security
mission.description: Every organization deserves enterprise-grade offensive security capabilities — without the enterprise complexity, cost, or headcount requirements. One prompt. Zero infrastructure. Complete audit.

team.title: Built by practitioners,
team.description: Our team combines deep offensive security expertise with advanced AI engineering. We understand what production security operations demand — because we've lived it.

meta.title: About — BJHUNT
meta.description: Learn about BJHUNT's mission to make world-class offensive security accessible to every team. Built by practitioners, for practitioners.

security.heroDescription: Every architectural decision starts with a single question: what does a production security platform need to be safe?

isolation.title: Data Isolation
isolation.description: Complete data and execution isolation between tenants. Zero-trust architecture — every request scoped to the authenticated organization. No bypass possible, even by application error.

auditTrails.title: Immutable Audit Trail
auditTrails.description: Every action recorded in an append-only log. Entries survive deletion of source objects. Designed for SOC 2 and ISO 27001 compliance audits.

sso.title: SSO & RBAC
sso.description: Enterprise single sign-on with role-based access control. SAML 2.0 and OIDC integration. Granular permissions scoped to organization, project, and audit level.

encryption.title: End-to-End Encryption
encryption.description: Data encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). Secrets never logged or exposed. Evidence stored with per-engagement encryption keys.

sandboxSecurity.title: Scope Enforcement
sandboxSecurity.description: Fail-closed scope enforcement. Signed mandates define what can be tested — nothing else executes. Modify scope mid-audit with immediate effect. No scope creep, no accidental exposure.

compliance.title: Compliance Ready
compliance.description: 13 compliance frameworks with dedicated reporting. PKCS#7 signed PDFs with RFC 3161 timestamps. Aligned with OWASP ASVS, PCI-DSS, ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIS2, DORA, GDPR, and HIPAA.

contact.heroSubtitle: Describe your target in natural language. BJHUNT 27B orchestrates specialists, executes the audit, and delivers signed reports across 13 frameworks. Book a call to learn how.
